data.title: CRV expected to reach $0.55-$0.72 by Feb 2026, based on technical indicators. Resistance at $0.45 must be broken.
data.description: Forecasts indicate a positive trend for CRV with technical analysis pointing towards potential price targets ranging from $0.55 to $0.72 within the next 4 to 6 weeks. This outlook is dependent on surpassing the resistance level at $0.45.

data.title: Hedge funds crowding varied by region in 2025 - Hazeltree's report shows differences in North America, EMEA, APAC. Tech, Financials, Healthcare lead crowdedness in North America.
data.description: In a recent report by Hazeltree, a renowned provider of integrated treasury and liquidity management solutions for alternative asset managers, it was revealed that hedge fund crowdedness in 2025 varied significantly by region, highlighting distinct economic influences in North America, EMEA, and APAC. The Hazeltree Crowdedness Report - 2025 Year in Review indicated that Technology, Financials, and Healthcare sectors were the prevalent areas for crowdedness positioning in North America. This data emphasizes the diverse investment trends seen across different regions.

data.title: R Systems introduces GCC Copilot to support growing demand; aids in establishing and enhancing Global Capability Centers.
data.description: In El Dorado Hills, California, R Systems has introduced GCC Copilot to aid enterprises in establishing, expanding, and enhancing Global Capability Centers.

data.title: NEACH appoints Elyssa Morgan as SVP, Chief Growth & Partnerships Officer to accelerate growth and strengthen partnerships.
data.description: In Burlington, Massachusetts, Elyssa Morgan has been promoted to the role of Senior Vice President, Chief Growth and Partnerships Officer at the New England Automated Clearing House (NEACH). Formerly the Vice President of Membership, Morgan will now focus on accelerating growth, forming strategic partnerships, and enhancing NEACH's presence within the payments industry. This new executive position aims to drive the organization's expansion and influence.

data.title: skinbetter science® marks 10 years of AlphaRet® technology, blending retinoid and AHA for visible skin results, used nightly.
data.description: skinbetter has been transforming the professional skincare sector with its groundbreaking AlphaRet technology, which has been recognized with awards since its introduction in 2016. This innovative technology sets the benchmark in the industry by effectively blending a retinoid and AHA to deliver noticeable results. It is safe for nightly use, making it convenient for users to incorporate into their routine. The company made this announcement in Los Angeles on January 14, 2026.

data.title: Financial advisors overwhelmingly optimistic about crypto with higher allocations, personal holdings, and recommendations - Bitwise survey shows.
data.description: Based on the most recent Bitwise survey, there has been an increase in allocations, personal holdings, and recommendations. The survey indicates positive growth in all these areas, with more individuals opting to invest in Bitwise products. This shows a widespread trend of rising interest and confidence in Bitwise, suggesting that the platform is gaining traction among investors. The survey results suggest a notable increase in the number of individuals using Bitwise for their investment needs, indicating a growing preference for this platform.

data.title: Edible Garden's Pickle Party now at Woodman's Markets, expanding distribution of fresh, kosher, non-GMO products in the Midwest.
data.description: The distribution of fresh, fermented, kosher, and non-GMO clean-label products in the Midwest is being expanded. This move will make these products more widely available across the region, catering to a larger consumer base. By increasing distribution, more customers will have access to these high-quality, health-conscious products. This expansion aims to reach a significant number of new retailers and consumers in the Midwest, highlighting the growing demand for such products in the market.

data.title: Rootquotient earns Amazon Web Services AI Competency on Jan. 14, 2026, showcasing expertise as AWS partner.
data.description: In Toronto on January 14, 2026, Rootquotient, a worldwide product engineering firm, revealed that it has earned the Amazon Web Services (AWS) AI Competency. This achievement designates Rootquotient as an AWS Partner aiding customers and the AWS Partner Network (APN) in utilizing artificial intelligence solutions.

data.title: Teledyne Technologies buys DD-Scientific with undisclosed terms. DD-Scientific makes gas sensors.
data.description: Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) based in Thousand Oaks, California, has recently acquired DD-Scientific Holdings Limited and its subsidiary DD-Scientific Limited. DD-Scientific, established in 2011 and located in Fareham, United Kingdom, specializes in producing top-notch gas sensors for precise applications in industries requiring utmost precision. The acquisition details have not been publicly disclosed. DD-Scientific is known for its production of superior, reliable gas sensors for critical applications.

data.title: Performance Shipping Inc. delivers M/T P. Marseille, a 114,000 DWT LNG-ready Tier III tanker, in China. Godmother: Aliki Paliou.
data.description: In Athens, Greece, on January 14, 2026, Performance Shipping Inc. (NASDAQ: PSHG), a global shipping company focused on tanker vessels, shared the successful delivery of the M/T P. Marseille. This marks the third vessel in their newbuilding initiative, built by Shanghai Waigaoqiao Shipbuilding Co. Ltd. The M/T P. Marseille, initially known as Hull H1597, is a 114,000 Deadweight Ton (DWT) LNG-ready Tier III product/crude oil tanker. The vessel's naming ceremony, conducted at the shipyard, had Ms. Aliki Paliou as the godmother who bestowed blessings upon the ship, wishing its crew safe journeys ahead.
Prospectus correction notice issued following the publication of important figures.

data.title: Coke announces leadership changes: Henrique Braun to become CEO on March 31, 2026, replacing James Quincey, who will remain Executive Chairman of the Board. Introduction of Chief Digital Officer role.
data.description: Coca-Cola Company (NYSE: KO) stock experienced a decline following the announcement of significant leadership changes. The renowned beverage company unveiled an updated executive structure with the goal of enhancing consumer focus and accelerating technology adoption. Henrique Braun is set to assume the position of CEO on March 31, 2026, taking over from James Quincey, who will transition to the role of Executive Chairman of the Board. Furthermore, a new Chief Digital Officer role has been established to consolidate digital, data, and operational expertise under one leader, with Sedef Salingan Sahin, the current president of the Eurasia and Middle East operating unit, appointed to this position reporting directly to Braun. This transformative strategy aims to drive innovation and operational efficiency within the company. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: FLOKI price aims for $0.000280 by Feb 2026 based on mixed signals. Currently at $0.00005377, with RSI at 59.81. Upside potential of 420%.
data.description: The token FLOKI is currently trading at $0.00005377, displaying neutral momentum while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 59.81. Despite bearish signals from the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD), analysts anticipate a potential 420% increase, projecting a target price of $0.000280 within the next four weeks.

data.title: The Brothers That Just Do Gutters is named in top 500 franchises by Entrepreneur Magazine for the fourth year.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, in Scottsdale, Arizona, The Brothers That Just Do Gutters, a prominent gutter contractor service under Evive Brands, received acknowledgment for being one of the top 500 franchises in Entrepreneur's Franchise 500® for the fourth year in a row. This prestigious ranking is a testament to their success and standing in the industry.
